hero.heading: Beautiful Floral Decorations for Every Occasion
hero.subheading: From Birth Ceremonies to Weddings and Respectful Floral Tributes

about.heading: About SAI FLOWERS AND DECORATORS
about.content1: With over 10 years of experience, we specialize in bringing your celebrations to life with premium, fresh floral arrangements.
about.content2: Whether it's a joyous wedding, an intimate naming ceremony, or a respectful floral tribute, our team provides creative and affordable decoration solutions with timely delivery and 100% customer satisfaction.

flower.name: Flower Decoration
flower.description: Fresh and beautiful floral setups for any event.
flower.details: We create stunning floral installations using the freshest blooms sourced daily. Every arrangement is custom-designed to match your event's theme, colour palette, and ambiance. From table centrepieces to full-venue transformations, our floral artistry makes your event unforgettable.
flower.idealFor: Weddings, receptions, corporate events, festive celebrations

marriage.name: Marriage Decoration
marriage.description: Complete floral setups for traditional marriages.
marriage.details: Our traditional marriage decoration service covers every ritual space — from the welcome gate to the mandap, dining area, and stage. We blend traditional Indian floral styles with modern aesthetics to honour your cultural customs beautifully.
marriage.idealFor: Hindu, Marathi, and multi-cultural traditional marriages

wedding.name: Wedding Decoration
wedding.description: Luxury floral stage and venue decoration.
wedding.details: Our premium wedding decoration service transforms any venue into a floral paradise. We handle everything — from the bridal entry path to the grand reception stage, floral ceiling canopies, and guest table settings — with impeccable attention to detail.
wedding.idealFor: Banquet halls, lawns, hotel weddings, destination weddings

mandap.name: Mandap Decoration
mandap.description: Ornate Hindu wedding mandaps with floral archways.
mandap.details: The mandap is the sacred heart of every Hindu wedding. We craft each mandap with devotion — using marigolds, roses, mogra, orchids, and seasonal blooms to create a divine canopy that frames your most important vows. Structures are fully custom and can be traditional or contemporary.
includes: Cushioned seating for bride and groom
mandap.idealFor: Hindu weddings, Brahman vidhi ceremonies, destination weddings

haldi.name: Haldi Decoration
haldi.description: Vibrant yellow marigold setups for Haldi ceremonies.
haldi.details: Haldi is a joyful, intimate family ceremony and we make it visually vibrant. Our signature Haldi setups feature cascading marigold strings, floral swings, turmeric-toned backdrops, and matching floral jewellery props — perfect for stunning photographs.
haldi.idealFor: Pre-wedding Haldi functions, family home ceremonies

mehendi.name: Mehendi Decoration
mehendi.description: Colorful floral and light decor for Mehendi nights.
mehendi.details: Mehendi nights call for colour, warmth, and festive energy. We create vibrant setups with bright florals, fairy lights, floor seating with cushion arrangements, and eye-catching photo-worthy backdrops that set the mood for a night full of fun.

engagement.name: Engagement Decoration
engagement.description: Elegant stage decoration for ring ceremonies.
engagement.details: An engagement is where your love story becomes official. Our engagement setups feature elegant floral stages, fresh flower garlands for the couple, petal-strewn pathways, and beautiful ring exchange areas — all designed to create an atmosphere of romance and elegance.
includes: Fresh flower garlands for bride and groom

reception.name: Reception Decoration
reception.description: Grand floral stages for wedding receptions.
reception.details: The reception is your grandest public celebration. We design spectacular reception stages with flower walls, LED-lit floral panels, draped ceilings, and luxurious table arrangements that create the perfect backdrop for photographs and memories.
reception.idealFor: Hotel banquets, lawn receptions, restaurant celebrations

birthday.name: Birthday Decoration
birthday.description: Creative balloon and flower setups for birthdays.
birthday.details: Whether it's a 1st birthday or a 50th, we tailor the decoration to the personality and theme. We combine balloon artistry with fresh florals to create birthday setups that are fun, photogenic, and memorable — from simple home parties to grand hall celebrations.
includes: Welcome board with name and age
birthday.idealFor: Kids' birthdays, milestone birthdays, surprise parties

baby_shower.name: Baby Shower Decoration
baby_shower.description: Pastel flowers and joyful themes for baby showers.
baby_shower.details: Celebrate the newest arrival with soft pastel florals, whimsical balloon clouds, and a beautiful mom-to-be chair setup. Our baby shower decorations are gentle, elegant, and create a warm, joyful atmosphere for family and friends to share.
baby_shower.idealFor: Godh bharai, baby shower parties, naamkaran pre-celebrations

anniversary.name: Anniversary Decoration
anniversary.details: Surprise your partner or celebrate your milestone with a deeply romantic floral setup. We specialise in intimate anniversary decorations at home or at a venue — rose petal trails, candlelight setups, heart-shaped floral walls, and personalised touches that make the evening feel truly special.
includes: Rose petal trail and floor art

naming.name: Naming Ceremony
naming.description: Traditional floral decor for Naamkaran ceremonies.
naming.details: Naamkaran is one of the most auspicious milestones in a child's life. We create a warm and traditional atmosphere using fresh flowers, marigold torans, flower swings (palna decoration), and a beautifully adorned ritual area that honours the occasion with grace.

housewarming.name: Housewarming Decoration
housewarming.description: Auspicious entrance decor for Griha Pravesh.
housewarming.details: Griha Pravesh marks a new beginning. We adorn your new home with auspicious floral decorations — marigold and mango leaf torans, rangoli accents, flower-decorated pooja areas, and a welcoming entrance that invites prosperity and positive energy into your home.
includes: Marigold and mango leaf toran at door
housewarming.idealFor: Griha Pravesh, flat possession, new office inauguration

corporate.name: Corporate Events
corporate.description: Professional floral styling for corporate functions.
corporate.details: Make your corporate event stand out with sophisticated, brand-aligned floral décor. We work with your company colours and theme to deliver polished arrangements for conferences, product launches, award nights, and office inaugurations — tasteful, professional, and impactful.
corporate.idealFor: Product launches, annual days, conferences, award nights, inaugurations

stage.name: Stage Decoration
stage.description: Elaborate floral backdrop walls for stages.
stage.details: Our stage decoration service creates spectacular visual centrepieces for any event. From full-coverage flower walls to mixed floral and LED panel backdrops, our stages are designed to photograph beautifully and command attention in any venue.
stage.idealFor: Award nights, cultural events, school functions, religious programs

car.name: Car Decoration
car.description: Elegant flower arrangements for wedding cars.
car.details: The wedding car is the couple's royal chariot. We decorate it inside and out with fresh roses, orchids, and ribbon work — creating a fairytale look that makes the couple's arrival and departure truly cinematic.
includes: Fresh flowers guaranteed on the day
car.idealFor: Bridal car, groom's car, baraat vehicles

temple.name: Temple Decoration
temple.description: Devotional floral setups for temple events.
temple.details: We bring devotion and beauty together in our temple decoration service. Using traditional flowers like marigold, mogra, lotus, and roses, we create sacred floral environments for pujas, festivals, and special religious events — honouring the divine with reverence.
temple.idealFor: Satyanarayan puja, Ganpati festival, temple anniversary, Diwali pooja

home.name: Home Decoration
home.description: Fresh floral interiors for festive occasions.
home.details: Transform your home into a festive haven with our home decoration service. We bring fresh blooms into your living spaces — from entrance torans and pooja rooms to living area arrangements and dining table centrepieces — filling your home with fragrance and colour.
home.idealFor: Diwali, Navratri, Ganesh Chaturthi, Dussehra, family functions at home

room.name: Room Decoration
room.description: Romantic room setups with rose petals.
room.details: Create an unforgettable, intimate experience with our room decoration service. Perfect for wedding nights, anniversaries, or a surprise for your partner — we arrange rose petal trails, candles, fairy lights, and flower installations that set the scene for romance.
includes: Rose petal trail on bed and floor
Fragrant flowers like roses and mogra
room.idealFor: Wedding night / suhaag raat, anniversary surprise, Valentine's Day

welcome.name: Welcome Decoration
welcome.description: Inviting floral archways for event entrances.
welcome.details: First impressions matter. Our welcome and entrance decorations set the tone for the entire event — beautiful floral archways, petal-strewn welcome paths, floral name boards, and ornate gate decorations that greet every guest with elegance.
welcome.idealFor: Any event entrance — weddings, parties, corporate events, pujas

bouquet.name: Flower Bouquet
bouquet.details: Our hand-tied bouquets are crafted with the freshest seasonal and imported flowers. Whether you need a bridal bouquet, a gift for a loved one, or a corporate gifting arrangement, we design each bouquet with care, wrapping it beautifully for presentation.
bouquet.idealFor: Bridal bouquet, gifting, congratulations, condolences, corporate gifting

balloon.name: Balloon Decoration
balloon.details: Balloons add instant festivity and colour to any celebration. Our balloon decoration service goes beyond simple bunches — we create sculpted arches, organic balloon walls, ceiling clusters, custom letter and number balloons, and themed balloon columns for all kinds of events.
balloon.idealFor: Birthdays, baby showers, gender reveals, farewell parties, festive events

torans.name: Torans
torans.details: Torans are the auspicious door hangings that welcome prosperity and blessings into any space. We make fresh marigold and mango leaf torans for festivals, weddings, and ceremonies — as well as dried flower and artificial torans for long-lasting decorations.
includes: Fresh marigold and mango leaf torans
torans.idealFor: Weddings, Diwali, Navratri, Ganesh Chaturthi, housewarming, any festival

funeral.name: Funeral Decoration
funeral.description: Respectful white floral tributes and setups.
funeral.details: We handle funeral and antim sanskar floral arrangements with the deepest sensitivity and respect. Our team provides timely, dignified white floral setups — from bier decoration to portrait garlands and full venue dressing — allowing families to focus on their loved ones.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, weddings are our specialty. We provide complete floral solutions including mandap, stage, and car decoration.
faq.q2: Do you travel outside the city?
faq.a2: Yes, we travel across Maharashtra for events depending on the scale of the decoration.
faq.a3: Absolutely, we work closely with your vision to create a customized setup that matches your theme and budget.
faq.a4: We recommend booking 1-2 months in advance, especially during the peak wedding season.
faq.a5: Yes, we source only the freshest flowers daily from premium local and international markets.
faq.a6: Prices vary by event type and scale. Contact us for a custom quote based on your specific needs.
faq.a7: Yes, we have various packages for different budgets, from intimate home events to grand hotel weddings.
faq.a8: WhatsApp us or fill the enquiry form and we'll respond within 2 hours with a consultation plan.

footer.about: Premium flower and event decoration services in Maharashtra. Bringing beauty and elegance to every occasion.
